title: Six Senses India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Six Senses India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Six Senses India are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Kanpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Six Senses India:
Six Senses India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in OTA Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Six Senses India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
